buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#40E0D0] to-[#FF9B71] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold text-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all shadow-soft hover:shadow-floating
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#8B4513] border-2 border-[#FF9B71] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold text-lg hover:bg-[#FFF5F0] transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#40E0D0] text-[#2E8B57] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:bg-[#E0F7FA] transition-all

cards.character_card: relative bg-white rounded-[32px] p-6 pt-16 mt-16 shadow-soft hover:shadow-card_hover transition-shadow text-center
cards.activity_tile: bg-white rounded-[24px] p-6 shadow-soft hover:shadow-floating transition-all border-4 border-transparent hover:border-[#40E0D0]
cards.product_card: bg-white rounded-[24px] p-4 shadow-soft hover:shadow-floating transition-all overflow-hidden
cards.download_card: bg-[#FFF9F0] rounded-[24px] p-6 shadow-soft border-2 border-[#FFE4B5]

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E5E7EB] py-4
navigation.sticky_bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-[#E5E7EB] py-3 px-4 shadow-[0_-10px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] flex justify-center gap-4 flex-wrap
navigation.admin_sidebar: bg-white w-64 h-screen border-r border-gray-200 p-4 fixed left-0 top-0 flex flex-col gap-2

flip_card.description: 3D rotation on Y-axis for character cards

marquee.description: Slow, smooth horizontal scrolling for downloads and products

specific_treatments.hero: Full viewport height with the Stingray Cay camp reference illustration as background cover. A floating 3D book cover effect in the center foreground. Overlay text uses white with strong text-shadow for readability over illustration.
specific_treatments.character_portraits: Circular images with a thick 4px border consisting of a turquoise-to-peach gradient ring. Floating out of their parent containers (negative top margin). Apply bobbing animation.
specific_treatments.interactive_map: Uses the Stingray Cay Camp illustration as a base image map. Hotspots (pins or pulsating dots) positioned over key areas (pool, hut, tent). Clicking a hotspot opens a modal or highlights a character/activity.
specific_treatments.admin_dashboard: Clean, light-themed interface avoiding harsh enterprise grays. Uses #F3F4F6 for background and white cards with #border-radius-2xl. High use of padding for breathing room. #40E0D0 accent for active states.
specific_treatments.wave_values: 4 Flip-cards detailing Welcome Curiosity, Act with Kindness, Value Teamwork, Encourage Others. Colorful fronts, text on back.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the hero section implements the referenced map image as a full-bleed background, with text and a floating book mockup clearly readable in front of it.
The 13 character portraits must float out of the tops of their respective flip cards. Use absolute positioning (e.g. -top-12) and apply the defined 'bobbing' animation.
Do not use generic grays or dull colors in the admin panel. Keep it clean but preserve the friendly nature with white panels and turquoise/peach accents.
Implement wave SVG dividers between key sections on the marketing pages to enhance the beachy theme.
Add the sticky bottom action bar with two large CTA buttons. Make sure it stays on top (z-index) without obscuring vital footer content.
All interactive elements must include 'data-testid' attributes per requirements.
